languages.text: {n}Триасомата прекращает бормотание и цепенеет. Конвульсивно дергаясь и пуская кровавую пену изо рта, он поворачивает искаженное ненавистью лицо на манипулуса.{/n}
{n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Триасомата прекращает бормотание и цепенеет. Конвульсивно дергаясь и пуская кровавую пену изо рта, он поворачивает искаженное ненавистью лицо на манипулуса.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Triasomata stops mumbling and freezes, spasming violently as bloody foam bubbles from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}
{n}The Triasomata stops mumbling and freezes, spasming violently as bloody foam bubbles from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}
{n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}
{n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}De pronto, el triasómata deja de balbucear y empieza a sufrir violentas convulsiones y echar espumarajos sangrientos. Su mirada, llena de odio, se dirige hacia el manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}De pronto, el triasómata deja de balbucear y empieza a sufrir violentas convulsiones y echar espumarajos sangrientos. Su mirada, llena de odio, se dirige hacia el manipulus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}三相体突然停止了嘟囔，剧烈地抽搐起来，嘴角溢出血沫。他扭过脸看向操纵者，面容因恨意而扭曲。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}三相体突然停止了嘟囔，剧烈地抽搐起来，嘴角溢出血沫。他扭过脸看向操纵者，面容因恨意而扭曲。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le Triasomata cesse subitement de marmonner ; une écume sanglante aux lèvres, son corps est pris de violentes convulsions. Il tourne vers le manipulus un visage déformé par la haine.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Triasomata cesse subitement de marmonner ; une écume sanglante aux lèvres, son corps est pris de violentes convulsions. Il tourne vers le manipulus un visage déformé par la haine.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Üçyeköz, aniden mırıldanmayı bırakıyor ve ağzından kanlı köpükler saçılırken şiddetli kasılmalar geçiriyor. Nefretle çarpılmış yüzünü Manipülus'a çeviriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Üçyeköz, aniden mırıldanmayı bırakıyor ve ağzından kanlı köpükler saçılırken şiddetli kasılmalar geçiriyor. Nefretle çarpılmış yüzünü Manipülus'a çeviriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}トリアソマタは突然つぶやくのをやめ、口から血の泡を吐き出しながら、激しく痙攣し始める。彼は憎悪にゆがんだ顔を、マニピュルスへと向ける。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}トリアソマタは突然つぶやくのをやめ、口から血の泡を吐き出しながら、激しく痙攣し始める。彼は憎悪にゆがんだ顔を、マニピュルスへと向ける。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Triasomata hört plötzlich auf zu murmeln und beginnt wild zu zucken, als blutiger Schaum aus seinem Mund austritt. Er richtet seinen hasserfüllten Blick auf den Manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}
